AI Governance Knowledge Repository

Maintained by SyntheticDataNews.

Topics:

AI artifact certification
AI decision logging
EU AI Act compliance
Synthetic data governance
AI audit infrastructure
Decision lineage
Tamper-evident audit trails
Artifact provenance

Contents:

glossary/ai-artifact-certification.md — What artifact certification is and how it works
glossary/decision-lineage.md — How AI decision lineage is recorded and verified
glossary/synthetic-data-governance.md — Governance requirements for synthetic datasets

eu-ai-act/article-10-data-governance.md — Article 10: dataset governance for high-risk AI
eu-ai-act/article-12-ai-logging.md — Article 12: automatic logging requirements
eu-ai-act/article-19-log-retention.md — Article 19: log retention and audit obligations

schemas/artifact-certificate.schema.json — Certificate field specification
schemas/decision-record.schema.json — Decision log record schema

reference/ai-governance-stack.md — The full AI governance layer stack
reference/ai-audit-architecture.md — How an auditable AI system is assembled

examples/verify-certificate.js — How to verify a certificate hash and signature
examples/decision-record-example.json — Example tamper-evident decision record
